arts.ttl: Celtic fans face Champions League ban after fresh UEFA charge
arts.sum: The Scottish champions were on a suspended ban for away fans following a series of fines over the use of pyrotechnics, and an incident at Villa Park on Wednesday has sparked a potential triggering of the punishment

arts.ttl: Celtic looking to fill Kyogo void with Slovakian striker David Strelec
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers is actively pursuing reinforcements to strengthen his squad.

arts.ttl: David Strelec is Celtic transfer target as Brendan Rodgers eyes £8million Champions League foe to replace Kyogo
arts.sum: The Slovan Bratislava striker caught the eye when playing at Parkhead earlier this season and could fit the bill

arts.ttl: Celtic's Adam Idah did what no other Champions League striker has managed vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Adam Idah scored the first away Champions League goal at Aston Villa this season Rogers was stunned by the Celtic support down south and the atmosphere created and that could potentially have had something to do with Idah break a record, of sorts, this season at the home of the Premier League outfit.

arts.ttl: Celtic fans deliver honest reactions on social media to potential Bayern Munich away day ban
arts.sum: But UEFA could ban Celtic fans from entering the stadium in what would be a huge blow to Brendan Rodgers, his squad and the club as a whole. Celtic supporters face a nervy wait for UEFA to announce whether or not fans will be banned from their glamour away tie vs Bayern Munich in February.

arts.ttl: 'It did surprise me' - Celtic boss addresses Kettlewell's Motherwell resignation
arts.sum: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers has expressed sympathy for Stuart Kettlewell after he was forced to resign from his managerial role at Motherwell.

arts.ttl: Celtic boss hopes fan ban threat changes pyro behaviour
arts.sum: Celtic face having no fans at their Champions League play-off game at Bayern Munich after the club received another disciplinary notice from Uefa.

arts.ttl: BBC reporter spots why Brendan Rodgers showed 'frustration' when Celtic were 2-2 with Aston Villa
arts.sum: Not the first time Rodgers shows Celtic anger this season Perfectionist Rodgers was annoyed at slack Celtic passing

arts.ttl: McGregor joining Celtic 500 club is not beginning of the end as Rodgers names 4 key reasons he has YEARS left
arts.sum: The Hoops boss reckons it is 500 not out with plenty of years still left in the tank for the captain

arts.ttl: Kris Commons picks Celtic captain of the future as star to look up to alongside Callum McGregor and Cameron Carter-Vickers
arts.sum: Kris Commons played with McGregor during his time in Glasgow and knows how vital he is to the way his team play as he dictates the middle of the park. “I know that Kieran Tierney will probably be a captain in the making.
